name: Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball 6.4cm Red Medium
description: The Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball is an engaging and interactive toy designed to keep small to medium-sized dogs physically active and mentally stimulated. This medium-sized treat ball features a playful teeth motif, giving dogs a humorous “toothy grin” when held in their mouth, while providing hours of fun. Made from durable, non-toxic SEBS rubber, the ball is soft enough to protect your dog’s teeth but firm enough for bouncing and fetch. Fill the ball with your dog’s favorite treats and watch as they work to retrieve them, promoting problem-solving and extended play sessions. Its bright red color ensures high visibility, perfect for outdoor adventures, backyard play, or water-based activities. Key Features Size: Medium, 6.4 cm (2.5 inches), ideal for small to medium dogs Material: Non-toxic SEBS rubber, gentle on teeth but durable for bouncing and chewing Treat-Dispensing: Encourages mental stimulation and problem-solving Play Benefits: Suitable for fetch, floats on water, and promotes physical activity Design: Teeth motif provides a fun “toothy grin” during play Bite Rating: Medium hardness, safe for chewing Care & Safety Hand washable for easy cleaning Supervise play, especially with aggressive chewers Can be used indoors, outdoors, or in water
